# Hicks Consulting

Hicks Consulting helps Black women heal beyond survival, break unhealthy cycles, and build healthier, more fulfilling lives through virtual therapy, coaching, and mental health support.

Hicks Consulting was created with Black women in mind and specializes in supporting Black women, while also serving clients of all ethnicities through virtual therapy, coaching, groups, consulting, and organizational training.

Monika Hicks is a Licensed Clinical Social Worker and mental health consultant. I am a purpose-driven mental health consultant who empowers others to heal beyond survival, break generational cycles, and intentionally choose healthier, more fulfilling ways of living.

Primary routes:
- /therapy/
- /coaching/
- /groups/
- /corporate-speaking/
- /resources/
- /contact/

Booking:
- Therapy and coaching consults: https://monika-hicks.clientsecure.me/
- Organizational training inquiries: info@hicksconsulting.org

Key entities:
- Hicks Consulting
- Monika Hicks, LCSW
- Virtual therapy in Tennessee
- Virtual coaching
- Virtual support groups
- In-person organizational trainings
